# `draw.table`

> **Stability:** stable
> **Since:** 0.5
> **Bucket:** `other`
> **Wire kind:** `table`

Draw a CSS-pixel viewport-anchored table. Unlike world-space
drawings, `draw.table` carries no `WorldPoint` anchor; adapters
resolve `position` against the visible viewport per PLAN.md §10.2.

## Anchors

`position` — CSS viewport anchor; `cells` — 2D grid payload

Anchor count: 0 (viewport anchored).

## Signature

```ts
function table(opts: TableOpts): DrawingHandle;
```

_The leading `slotId: string` parameter is injected by the chartlang compiler at every callsite — script authors call `draw.table(...)` without it._

## Example

```ts
import { defineIndicator } from "@invinite-org/chartlang-core";
    export default defineIndicator({
        name: "draw.table demo",
        apiVersion: 1,
        compute({ draw }) {
            draw.table({
                position: "top-right",
                cells: [[{ text: "P&L" }, { text: "+12.5%", textColor: "#16a34a" }]],
            });
        },
    });
```
